title: Perceived fairness and public acceptability of carbon pricing: A review of the literature
authors: Sara Maestre-Andrés, Stefan Drews, Jeroen van den Bergh

tax_mentions.context: Reviews empirical studies on fairness perceptions, acceptability, and revenue recycling of carbon taxes.
Discusses acceptability and fairness findings for CO2 tax increases.
Includes acceptance of a gasoline tax increase as climate policy.
tax_mentions.page_or_section: Section 3.2; cited study Kaplowitz and McCright (2015)

excluded_policy_mentions.reason_it_is_not_a_carbon_or_fuel_tax: Tradable permit scheme, not a tax instrument.

inclusion_reason: Systematic review of empirical studies on carbon-tax fairness, acceptability, and revenue recycling, explicitly covering CO2 tax and gasoline-tax support.
